raw.n: Dws Govt Money Market Series Institutional Shares

holdings.n: Dws Govt Money Market Series Institutional Shares

holdings.infoBox: DEUS is an equity ETF with a total of 846 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 1.30%, McKesson at 1.04%, Western Digital at 0.87%, Altria Group at 0.82%, and Jabil at 0.71%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Russell US Multifactor ETF (DEUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Comprehensive Factor index. The fund selects and weights securities within the Russell 1000 by five different factors. DEUS was launched on Nov 24, 2015 and is issued by Xtrackers.
